likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Ponte Pedonal.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH POHNG-tih peh-doo-NAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Pedestrian Bridge.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Pedestrian Bridge.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH POHNG-tih peh-doo-NAHL.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Ponte Pedonal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Panoramic Elevator is
phrases.cultural_note: O elevador panorâmico é um ponto de referência visível, acessível pela ponte pedonal da marina.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the access to Praia dos Pescadores is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o acesso à Praia dos Pescadores?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW uh-SEH-soo AH PREYEUH DOOSH pehsh-kuh-DOH-rihsh?
phrases.cultural_note: A Praia dos Pescadores é acessível por elevador ou escadas, sendo um dos cartões-postais mais tradicionais de Albufeira.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Acesso à Praia dos Pescadores.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW uh-SEH-soo AH PREYEUH DOOSH pehsh-kuh-DOH-rihsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the access to Praia dos Pescadores.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the access to Praia dos Pescadores.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW uh-SEH-soo AH PREYEUH DOOSH pehsh-kuh-DOH-rihsh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Acesso à Praia dos Pescadores.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o cais de embarque para os passeios de barco?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KEYESH DIH aym-BAH-ruh-kih PUH-ruh OOSH puh-SAYOOSH DIH BAH-ruh-koo?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Cais das Embarcações.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KEYESH DUHSH aym-buh-ruh-kuh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Boat Dock.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Boat Dock.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KEYESH DUHSH aym-buh-ruh-kuh-SOHNYSH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Cais das Embarcações.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Coastal Walkway is
phrases.cultural_note: O passadiço costeiro começa junto ao cais das embarcações e segue ao longo da costa.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Passadiço Costeiro.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW puh-suh-DEE-soo koosh-TAY-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Coastal Walkway.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Coastal Walkway.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW puh-suh-DEE-soo koosh-TAY-roo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Passadiço Costeiro.
